goal: Auth robustness and profile page performance
summary: Phase 3 complete. Auth races fixed: removed zustand/persist, eliminated double-fire of ensureUserProfile, simplified reset password flow, removed racy username check. Profile performance fixed: removed backdrop-filter blur from scrollable content (curing GPU jank/black blocks), extracted EditProfileModal with anti-race guards, BadgeGrid now shows 8 default locked badges instead of empty state.
stepSummaries:
1. Fix auth race conditions in useAuth.ts, Login.tsx, Signup.tsx, ForgotPassword.tsx, ResetPassword.tsx [verified]
  2. Replace backdrop-filter blur on scrollable content with solid backgrounds; keep blur only on fixed nav [verified]
  3. Fix EditProfileModal avatar race and BadgeGrid empty state [verified]
